backstory.original: Birdsong, a cunning young Tabaxi bard, learned to defend herself while enslaved by the Yuan-ti. Proficient in playing the lute, Birdsong discovered her potential as a bard when witnessing the effect her songs had on other slaves. After her escape, she became one of the greatest minstrels of Chult. She promised herself to, one day, get revenge on the Yuan-ti who destroyed her village.
backstory.display: 鸟歌，一个狡黠的年轻斑猫人吟游诗人，在被蛇人奴役时学会了保护自己。鸟歌精通弹奏鲁特琴，当看到她的歌声对其他奴隶产生的影响时，她发现了自己作为吟游诗人的潜力。在逃脱奴役后，她成为了楚尔特最伟大的吟游诗人。她向自己发誓，有朝一日要向摧毁她村庄的蛇人复仇。

description.original: Birdsong leaps out with a cat's grace and attacks the nearest enemies with her sword.
description.display: 鸟歌以猫般的优雅跃出，用她的剑攻击距离最近的敌人。

description.original: Birdsong leaps from enemy to enemy, dealing damage and stunning them.
description.display: 鸟歌从一名敌人跳向另一名敌人，造成伤害并眩晕他们。

longDescription.original: Birdsong leaps from enemy to enemy 5 times, dealing damage and stunning them for 5 seconds. Enemies she attacks during her ultimate take 200% extra damage from all Champions for 15 seconds.
longDescription.display: 鸟歌从一名敌人跳向另一名敌人 5 次，造成伤害并使其眩晕 5 秒。所有勇士对鸟歌杀招期间受到她攻击的敌人额外造成 200% 的伤害，持续 15 秒。

conditions.desc: Increases the damage of Champions within three slots of Birdsong by $amount%, including Birdsong herself.
Increases the damage of Champions within two slots of $(source_hero) by $(amount)%, including Birdsong herself.
Increases the damage of Champions within three slots of Birdsong by $amount%, including Birdsong herself.
距离$(source_hero) 2 格内勇士的伤害提高 $(amount)%，包括鸟歌自己。

tipText.original: Birdsong buffs Champions within two slots of herself. Use her as your main DPS, or keep your main DPS nearby.
tipText.display: 鸟歌为距离自己两格以内的勇士提供增益。使用她作为主要伤害输出，或者把你的主要伤害输出放在她附近。

description.desc: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_name upgrade_id) on Good Champions by $(amount)%.
$(upgrade_name upgrade_id)的效果对善良阵营勇士提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Birdsong focuses her song on Good Champions
specializationDescription.display: 鸟歌的歌声专注于善良阵营勇士

description.desc: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_name upgrade_id) on Neutral (Good/Evil axis) Champions by $(amount)%.
$(upgrade_name upgrade_id)的效果对中立阵营（善良/邪恶划分）勇士提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Birdsong focuses her song on Neutral Champions
specializationDescription.display: 鸟歌的歌声专注于中立阵营勇士

description.desc: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_name upgrade_id) on Evil Champions by $(amount)%.
$(upgrade_name upgrade_id)的效果对邪恶阵营勇士提高 $(amount)%。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_targets

specializationDescription.original: Birdsong focuses her song on Evil Champions
specializationDescription.display: 鸟歌的歌声专注于邪恶阵营勇士

description.desc: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id) by $(not_buffed amount)% for each positional formation ability affecting $(source_hero) that comes from a Champion who has no affiliation, stacking multiplicatively.
无从属组织勇士影响$(source_hero)的每个位置阵型技能均使$(upgrade_name id)的效果提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Birdsong works best when she's getting buffed by unaffiliated Champions.
tipText.display: 鸟歌受到无从属组织勇士增益的时候表现最佳。

description.desc: Increases the effect of $(upgrade_name id___2) by $(amount)% whenever any Champion affected by $(upgrade_name id___2) gets the killing blow on an enemy. This effect can stack up to $(max_stacks___2) times, once for each kill. Stacks multiplicatively. Stacks are reset when changing areas.
每当受$(upgrade_name id___2)影响的勇士对敌人造成致命一击时，$(upgrade_name id___2)的效果提高 $(amount)%。此效果最多可堆叠 $(max_stacks___2) 层，每次击杀一层。以乘算方式堆叠。改变区域时重置层数。
$(source_hero) starts each area with Crescendo stacks equal to the number of Lawful Champions in the formation.
在每个区域开始时，$(source_hero)的“高潮迭起”堆叠层数等同于阵型中守序勇士的数量。

specializationDescription.original: Birdsong focuses her song on Lawful Champions
specializationDescription.display: 鸟歌的歌声专注于守序阵营勇士

description.desc: $(source_hero) starts each area with Crescendo stacks equal to the number of Female Champions in the formation.
在每个区域开始时，$(source_hero)的“高潮迭起”堆叠层数等同于阵型中女性勇士的数量。

specializationDescription.original: Birdsong focuses her song on Female Champions
specializationDescription.display: 鸟歌的歌声专注于女性勇士

description.desc: $(source_hero) starts each area with Crescendo stacks equal to the number of Bard Champions in the formation.
在每个区域开始时，$(source_hero)的“高潮迭起”堆叠层数等同于阵型中吟游诗人勇士的数量。

specializationDescription.original: Birdsong focuses her song on Bards
specializationDescription.display: 鸟歌的歌声专注于吟游诗人

description.desc: When $(source_hero) attacks she makes one bonus attack against a random boss enemy, dealing $(seconds_plural amount) of BUD-based damage.
当$(source_hero)攻击时，她对一名随机首领敌人发动一次额外攻击，造成 $(seconds_plural amount) 基础杀招伤害。

description.original: Battle is like a dance, and I am the musician.
description.display: 战斗就像跳舞，而我就是乐师。

description.original: The tempo of battle excites me.
description.display: 战斗的节奏让我兴奋。

description.original: Take away my blades and I'll show you what these claws can do.
description.display: 把我的刀拿走，我让你见识一下这些爪子的威力。

description.original: I do not just sing for myself.
description.display: 我不只是为自己而歌唱。

description.original: My song inspires everyone!
description.display: 我的歌声能鼓舞所有人！

description.original: I'll lead, if you don't mind. It's just like a dance.
description.display: 如果你不介意的话，我来带头。这和跳舞没两样。

description.original: I can feel the beat of the battle. Take off your boots and I'll show you!
description.display: 我能感觉到战斗的节奏。脱下你的靴子，我让你瞧瞧！

description.original: Can you hear the rhythm?
description.display: 你能听到这旋律吗？

description.original: Listen to the footfalls. They march in step. Prepare yourselves.
description.display: 听听这脚步声吧。他们齐步前进，你们要做好准备了。

description.original: We can be a pack together!
description.display: 我们可以组成兽群！

description.original: Your actions have proven your worth!
description.display: 你用行动证明了你的价值！

description.original: The song sings of triumph.
description.display: 唱起胜利的歌。

description.original: Just keep it going!
description.display: 继续，不要停！

description.original: These limbs don't move fast enough in my opinon.
description.display: 在我看来，这些肢体不够灵活。

effects.description: Birdsong also counts as a Warforged

description.original: A broadened perspective inspires the heart to greater heights.
description.display: 开阔的视野能让心灵上升到更高的境界。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by 20% for each unique species in the formation, stacking additively.

description.original: I've been sharpening my claws for days!
description.display: 我已经磨爪子好几天了！

description.original: I'll just barf it up in a bit, don't worry.
description.display: 我一会儿就吐出来，别担心。

description.original: Once more for the people in the back!
description.display: 为后面的人再唱一次！

effects.description: Increases the range of Birdsong's Song of Battle ability by 1

description.original: Agent Birdsong, ready. Time for the final act.
description.display: 特工鸟歌，准备就绪！是时候上演最后一幕了。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $amount% for each Unaffiliated Champion in the formation

effects.notes: NEW EFFECT Birdsong may be used in any The Tales of the Champions adventure or variant when a patron is enabled, even if the patron or variant restrictions would normally restrict her.

character_sheet_details.backstory: Birdsong, a cunning young Tabaxi bard, learned to defend herself while enslaved by the Yuan-ti. Proficient in playing the lute, Birdsong discovered her potential as a bard when witnessing the effect her songs had on other slaves. After her escape, she became one of the greatest minstrels of Chult. She promised herself to, one day, get revenge on the Yuan-ti who destroyed her village.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Birdsong buffs nearby Champions with her Song of Battle, which can be improved when she participates in the battle, especially if she gets killing blows.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 鸟歌，一个狡黠的年轻斑猫人吟游诗人，在被蛇人奴役时学会了保护自己。鸟歌精通弹奏鲁特琴，当看到她的歌声对其他奴隶产生的影响时，她发现了自己作为吟游诗人的潜力。在逃脱奴役后，她成为了楚尔特最伟大的吟游诗人。她向自己发誓，有朝一日要向摧毁她村庄的蛇人复仇。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 鸟歌用她的战歌为附近的勇士们提供增益。当她参与战斗，尤其是获得击杀时，战歌的增益效果会获得提升。
